ref: Many Pharisees and Sadducees also came to be baptized. But John said to them: You bunch of snakes! Who warned you to run from the coming judgment?
text: Jɔɔn na wa nyɛ a Faraseemɩne nɩ a Saduseemɩne na waara a Nãaŋmɩn kʊ̃ɔ sofʊ jie, ka wʊ 'yɛr kʊ ba, “Yɩn waa bibiir, an n 'yɛr kʊ yɩ ɩka yɩ jo yi a Nãaŋmɩn suur na waara mɔ̃?
translated: The Pharisees and Sadducees came to test Jesus by asking him to show them a sign from heaven. He replied, "When evening comes, you say, 'The weather will be fair, for the sky is red,'"

ref: The chief priests and the whole council wanted to put Jesus to death. So they tried to find some people who would tell lies about him in court.
text: Ka a Juu nɩbɛ bɔɔrlo nɩbɛrɛ nɩ a 'yɛr tɔɔrfʊ nɩbɛrɛ pãa bʊɔrɔ jir ŋmarba ka ba na ŋmaa jire 'yɔ̃ɔ wʊ, ka ba na tu a be kʊ a Yesu.
translated: And Jesus said to them, "You will all fall away because of me this night, for it is written, 'I will strike the shepherd, and the sheep of the flock will be scattered.' But after I am raised up, I will go before you to Galilee."

ref: “Why don't your disciples obey what our ancestors taught us to do? They don't even wash their hands before they eat.”
text: “Ŋmɩnɛ a fʊ poturbo ba turo a sɩ sãakpãmɩne wiilfʊ ɛ? Ba maa pɛɛ a ba nuur tɩ di ɛ.”
translated: Why did the white man come and take our land and make us suffer? They said they came to help us.

ref: All of these come from your heart, and they are what make you unfit to worship God. A Woman's Faith (Matthew
text: A yeldɛbɛ anyãna a jaa lɛ ma yi a nɩrɛ pʊtɩɛr pɔ, vɛ̃ ka wʊ dɛɛ.”
translated: When the elders are sitting and you want to pass by them, you should greet them.

ref: Don't call anyone on earth your father. All of you have the same Father in heaven.
text: Yɩ ta bʊɔl nɩrɛ jaa yɩ, sãa a wɛr pɔ ɛ, bojũu yɩ tara na Sãa bʊ̃'yen na be a saaju.
translated: When the lizard eats pepper, it does not forget that it once lived on the banks of the river.
